---
title: "Workshop 01 — Day 1"
subtitle: "Welcome & Introduction to Arboreal Monitoring"
date: 2024-03-01
---

## Schedule

| Time | Topic | Facilitator |
|---|---|---|
| 09:00 - 09:30 | Welcome & Project Overview | Jane Doe |
| 09:30 - 10:30 | Introduction to Arboreal Monitoring | Jane Doe |
| 10:30 - 10:45 | Break | |
| 10:45 - 12:00 | Hands-on Exercise: Getting Started | Maria Lopez |

## Video Recording

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VIDEO_ID >}}

## Slides

[View Slides](slides.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}

## R Code

```{.r filename="analysis.R"}
library(tidyverse)

# Load example dataset
df <- read_csv("data.csv")

# Quick summary
glimpse(df)

df |>
  ggplot(aes(x = species, y = count)) +
  geom_col() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Species Counts - Workshop 01, Day 1")
```

[Download R Script](analysis.R){.btn .btn-outline-primary}

## Reference Document

<iframe src="reference.pdf" width="100%" height="600px" style="border: none;"></iframe>

[Download PDF](reference.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
